headline: Earnings Preview: Alliant Energy (LNT) Q2 Earnings Expected to Decline
summary: Alliant Energy (LNT) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.
